name: cta-close
title: CTA Close
description: A display-scale action line lands per word and fills the frame with air, one generous CTA capsule pops beneath it with a single overshoot, and the finished close holds completely still.

variables.label: Action line
variables.description: Two to four word action that closes the film.

variables.label: Button label
variables.description: Text displayed inside the single CTA capsule.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Contract color used by the CTA capsule.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the lockup holds until the frame cuts (this primitive closes films).
